title: Today's AI Brief: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
summary: Cisco and OpenAI team up with Codex, CEOs hunt for AI bargains, and the evolving AI landscape

body.text: I'm looking at some interesting developments in the world of AI. It seems like we're seeing a shift towards more practical applications of AI in the enterprise. One of the big players, Cisco, has teamed up with OpenAI to leverage their Codex technology. For those who might not know, Codex is essentially a tool that helps developers write code more efficiently.

So, what does this partnership mean? Well, Cisco is using Codex to scale AI-native development, which basically means they're looking to build more AI-powered products and services. They're also using it to accelerate AI defense work and automate defect remediation. My read is that this is a big deal because it shows how AI is becoming a critical component of enterprise engineering.

In other news, it seems like CEOs are on the hunt for AI bargains. According to Axios, business leaders are looking for ways to get more bang for their buck when it comes to AI investments. I think this is interesting because it highlights the evolving economics of AI. As the technology becomes more mainstream, companies are looking for ways to make the most of their investments.

I'm curious to see how these developments play out. One thing that stands out to me is the importance of data boundaries and safety in AI adoption. As more companies start to integrate AI into their products and services, we'll need to see more emphasis on responsible AI development. For now, it's clear that AI is becoming increasingly important for enterprise engineering, and partnerships like Cisco and OpenAI are leading the way.

My quick read: the artificial intelligence story keeps getting bigger, but also stranger in very human ways. One moment it is strategy and infrastructure; the next, the Vatican is in the room. That is a pretty good sign this technology has left the lab and wandered into the town square.

sources.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
CEOs go bargain hunting for AI - Axios
